emails.subject: Natsource
emails.body: Tana Attached is a version of the BETA reflecting changes made for Natsource. Can you please put these into a side letter agreement for Natsource and send that to me for review. Thanks. Mark Senior Counsel, ENA Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3940 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com
